# API Reference

<!-- Generated by `bun run docs:api`. Do not edit by hand. -->

Generated from server route metadata. Keep `openapi.yaml` aligned with these routes.

Total endpoints: 61

## Agents

### GET `/api/agents`

List agents.

- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/agents`

Create an agent.

- Request body: Agent create payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/agents/{id}`

Read an agent.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

### PATCH `/api/agents/{id}`

Update an agent.

- Path params: `id`
- Request body: Agent update payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### DELETE `/api/agents/{id}`

Delete an agent.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

## Board

### GET `/api/projects`

List projects.

- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/projects`

Create a project.

- Request body: Project create payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/projects/{id}`

Read a project.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

### PATCH `/api/projects/{id}`

Update a project.

- Path params: `id`
- Request body: Project update payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### DELETE `/api/projects/{id}`

Delete a project.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

## Chat

### GET `/api/chat/sessions`

List chat sessions.

- Query params: `workspaceId`
- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/chat/sessions`

Create a chat session.

- Request body: Chat session create payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### PATCH `/api/chat/sessions/{id}`

Update a chat session.

- Path params: `id`
- Request body: Chat session update payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### DELETE `/api/chat/sessions/{id}`

Archive a chat session.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages`

List chat session messages.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages`

Append a chat session message.

- Path params: `id`
- Request body: Chat message create payload.
- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/chat/sessions/{id}/send`

Queue a chat send request.

- Path params: `id`
- Request body: Chat send payload.
- Response: Accepted send status.

### GET `/api/chat/sessions/{id}/status`

Read chat session status.

- Path params: `id`
- Response: JSON response.

## CLI

### GET `/api/cli/history`

List in-memory CLI execution history.

- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/computers`

List registered workflow worker computers.

- Response: JSON response.

## Docs

### GET `/api/docs/routes`

List generated server API docs.

- Response: JSON response.

## GitHub

### GET `/api/github/connection`

Read stored GitHub connection status.

- Response: JSON response.

### DELETE `/api/github/connection`

Disconnect the stored GitHub account.

- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/github/device/poll`

Poll the GitHub device authorization flow.

- Request body: Device polling request.
- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/github/device/start`

Start the GitHub device authorization flow.

- Request body: Device flow start request.
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/github/oauth/callback`

Complete the GitHub OAuth flow.

- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/github/oauth/start`

Start the GitHub OAuth flow.

- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/github/repositories`

List repositories for the connected GitHub account.

- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/github/repositories/search`

Search GitHub repositories.

- Query params: `q`
- Response: JSON response.

## Health

### GET `/health`

Check server health.

- Response: JSON response.

## Inbox

### GET `/api/inbox/messages`

List inbox messages.

- Query params: `workspaceId`, `userId`, `runId`
- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/inbox/messages`

Create an inbox message.

- Request body: Inbox message create payload.
- Response: JSON response.

## Notifications

### POST `/api/notifications`

Send an internal server notification.

- Request body: Notification server request.
- Response: JSON response.

### POST `/api/notifications/email`

Send an email notification.

- Request body: Notification email request.
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/polling/status`

Read polling runtime status.

- Response: JSON response.

## Workspace

### GET `/api/workspace/current`

Read the active workspace identity.

- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/workspace/environment`

Read workspace filesystem and MCP environment status.

- Query params: `projectId`
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/workspaces/{workspaceId}/projects`

List projects in a workspace.

- Path params: `workspaceId`
- Response: JSON response.

### GET `/api/workspaces/{workspaceId}/projects/{projectId}/board`

Read a workspace project board.

- Path params: `workspaceId`, `projectId`
- Response: JSON response.
